description: Composition Black T-shirt for men made of 58% cotton and 42% polyester, has a round ribbed neckline, short sleeves, stitch detailing on the shoulders, has brand name printed on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Get casual with comfort in this T-shirt from nike. The blended fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the brand logo adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
